charts.name: HTTP TPS 15m
charts.description: Backend HTTP transactions per second over the latest 15 minutes inside the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: WITH greatest({{start_time}}, {{end_time}} - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS window_start SELECT round(countMerge(events_count) / greatest(dateDiff('second', window_start, {{end_time}}), 1), 3) AS value FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN window_start AND {{end_time}}

charts.name: HTTP Error %
charts.description: Share of backend HTTP requests classified as 4xx or 5xx over the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT round(coalesce(sumIf(points, status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')) / nullIf(sum(points), 0), 0), 4) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS points FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY status_class)

charts.name: HTTP 2xx
charts.description: Successful backend HTTP responses over the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT coalesce(sumIf(points, status_class = '2xx'), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS points FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY status_class)

charts.name: HTTP 4xx/5xx
charts.description: Backend client and server errors over the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT coalesce(sumIf(points, status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx')), 0) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS points FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY status_class)
SELECT round(maxMerge(value_max), 0) AS value FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.ws.connections.current' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}}

charts.name: External Error %
charts.description: Share of outbound provider transactions classified as 4xx, 5xx, or err over the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT round(coalesce(sumIf(points, status_class IN ('4xx', '5xx', 'err')) / nullIf(sum(points), 0), 0), 4) AS value FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS points FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.external_requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY status_class)

charts.name: HTTP Status Breakdown
charts.description: Backend 1xx/2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx request counts and percentages for the selected range.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT status_class, requests, round(requests / nullIf(sum(requests) OVER (), 0), 4) AS pct FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS requests FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY status_class) ORDER BY status_class

charts.name: External Provider Status
charts.description: Outbound provider/API request counts and per-provider status percentages.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT provider, status_class, requests, round(requests / nullIf(sum(requests) OVER (PARTITION BY provider), 0), 4) AS provider_pct FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['provider'], 'unknown') AS provider, coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS status_class, countMerge(events_count) AS requests FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.external_requests' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY provider, status_class) ORDER BY provider, requests DESC

charts.name: HTTP Requests by Status Class - Last 3h
charts.description: Backend HTTP volume, narrowed to the latest 3 hours so the 24h dashboard does not collapse fresh data into a thin right edge.

chart_queries.sql_query: WITH greatest({{start_time}}, {{end_time}} - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) AS window_start SELECT {{time}} AS time, countMerge(events_count) AS value, 'HTTP ' || coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS series FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.http.requests' AND dt BETWEEN window_start AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

charts.name: External Latency by Provider
charts.description: Outbound provider/API latency computed from structured logs, because current histogram buckets do not yet produce reliable p95 values.

chart_queries.sql_query: /* {{source}} */ SELECT provider, count() AS requests, round(avg(duration_ms), 1) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(duration_ms), 1) AS p95_ms, max(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM (SELECT JSONExtract(raw, 'provider', 'Nullable(String)') AS provider, coalesce(JSONExtract(raw, 'duration_ms', 'Nullable(Int64)'), JSONExtract(raw, 'duration.ms', 'Nullable(Int64)'), toInt64OrNull(extract(JSONExtractString(raw, 'message'), 'duration: ([0-9]+)ms'))) AS duration_ms FROM remote(t558886_adsbao_data_service_logs_logs) WHERE dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} AND JSONExtract(raw, 'event.name', 'Nullable(String)') = 'external_request_done') WHERE duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY provider ORDER BY requests DESC

charts.name: DB Transactions
charts.description: Database operation counts grouped by operation/result. Latency requires one more direct duration field because current histogram bucket aggregates are empty.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT operation, result, transactions, round(transactions / nullIf(sum(transactions) OVER (), 0), 4) AS pct FROM (SELECT coalesce(tags['operation'], 'unknown') AS operation, coalesce(tags['result'], 'unknown') AS result, countMerge(events_count) AS transactions FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.db.transactions' AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY operation, result) ORDER BY transactions DESC

charts.name: WebSocket Activity
charts.description: WebSocket upgrades, connects, disconnects, subscribes, unsubscribes, and message outcomes.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT replaceRegexpOne(name, '^adsbao\\.ws\\.', '') AS metric, coalesce(nullIf(tags['result'], ''), coalesce(nullIf(tags['direction'], ''), 'all')) AS series, countMerge(events_count) AS events FROM {{source}} WHERE name IN ('adsbao.ws.upgrades', 'adsbao.ws.connections', 'adsbao.ws.disconnects', 'adsbao.ws.messages', 'adsbao.ws.subscribe', 'adsbao.ws.unsubscribe') AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY metric, series ORDER BY metric, events DESC

charts.name: External Transactions - Last 3h
charts.description: Outbound provider/API transaction volume grouped by provider and status class, narrowed to the latest 3 hours for readability.

chart_queries.sql_query: WITH greatest({{start_time}}, {{end_time}} - INTERVAL 3 HOUR) AS window_start SELECT {{time}} AS time, countMerge(events_count) AS value, coalesce(tags['provider'], 'unknown') || ' ' || coalesce(tags['status_class'], 'unknown') AS series FROM {{source}} WHERE name = 'adsbao.external_requests' AND dt BETWEEN window_start AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

charts.name: Channel Health
charts.description: Latest channel subscriber, active-channel, stale-channel, and consecutive-failure gauges.

chart_queries.sql_query: SELECT replaceRegexpOne(name, '^adsbao\\.', '') AS metric, coalesce(nullIf(tags['channel_type'], ''), 'all') AS channel_type, round(maxMerge(value_max), 0) AS latest FROM {{source}} WHERE name IN ('adsbao.active_channels.current', 'adsbao.subscriptions.current', 'adsbao.stale_channels.current', 'adsbao.channel_consecutive_failures.current') AND dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} GROUP BY metric, channel_type ORDER BY metric, latest DESC

charts.name: Recent External Errors
charts.description: Recent warning/error logs with provider, status, duration, and message columns.

chart_queries.sql_query: /* {{source}} */ SELECT dt, JSONExtract(raw, 'level', 'Nullable(String)') AS level, JSONExtract(raw, 'provider', 'Nullable(String)') AS provider, JSONExtract(raw, 'status', 'Nullable(String)') AS status, coalesce(JSONExtract(raw, 'duration_ms', 'Nullable(Int64)'), JSONExtract(raw, 'duration.ms', 'Nullable(Int64)'), toInt64OrNull(extract(JSONExtractString(raw, 'message'), 'duration: ([0-9]+)ms'))) AS duration_ms, JSONExtractString(raw, 'message') AS message FROM remote(t558886_adsbao_data_service_logs_logs) WHERE dt BETWEEN {{start_time}} AND {{end_time}} AND JSONExtract(raw, 'level', 'Nullable(String)') IN ('warn', 'error') ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 100
